name: Helm of the Overlord
description: The powerful headpiece of an undead necromancer.

abilities.name: Dominate
abilities.description: Takes control of an enemy non-hero unit, elevating its status to a Creep-Hero, and granting it various stat bonuses. Can dominate ancient creeps. Cooldown: 45. Mana Cost: 50. Cast Range: 700. Min Base Health: 1800. Base Attack Damage Bonus: 70. Health Regen Bonus: 12. If a target neutral creep has a scaling ability, its level gets increased and has its 4th level unlocked.
